lessons.title: When useState Isn't Enough
lessons.description: Understand the limitations of useState and when to consider useReducer.

lessons.title: The Reducer Pattern
lessons.description: Learn the reducer concept from Redux and JavaScript's Array.reduce.

lessons.title: useReducer Syntax and Basics
lessons.description: Write your first reducer and dispatch actions.

lessons.title: Complex State with useReducer
lessons.description: Manage objects and multiple values with a reducer.

lessons.title: Combining useReducer with Context
lessons.description: Create a mini Redux-like store using useReducer and Context.
